clean_headline: Varun Beverages subsidiary Bevco has executed agreement to acquire 100% equity stake in Crickley Dairy Proprietary Limited, subject to regulatory approvals.
raw_headline: Intimation for execution of agreement by The Beverage Company Proprietary Limited, subsidiary of the Company as per details attached

clean_headline: The Beverage Company Proprietary Limited, subsidiary of our Company in South Africa, has acquired 100% Share Capital of Twizza Proprietary Limited.
raw_headline: The Beverage Company Proprietary Limited, subsidiary of our Company in South Africa, has acquired 100% Share Capital of Twizza Proprietary Limited.
